steps.name: demo-rehearsal-script-and-timing-gate
steps.summary: DRQ1 added scripts/demo_rehearsal_script.py, tests/test_demo_rehearsal_script.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-drq1-demo-rehearsal-script.md. It defines eight public-safe demo rehearsal stages, operator commands, expected report outputs, recovery routes, and a 11.0-minute timing budget.

steps.name: demo-run-quality-checklist
steps.summary: DRQ2 added scripts/demo_run_quality_checklist.py, tests/test_demo_run_quality_checklist.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-drq2-demo-run-quality-checklist.md. It defines pass checks, failure notes, recovery routes, and timing checks for all eight demo rehearsal stages.

steps.name: rehearsal-evidence-capture
steps.summary: DRQ3 added scripts/demo_rehearsal_evidence_capture.py, tests/test_demo_rehearsal_evidence_capture.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-drq3-demo-rehearsal-evidence.md. It captures a public-safe local rehearsal run fixture with eight stage results, timing metadata, and one timing warning for improvement backlog input.

steps.name: demo-improvement-backlog
steps.summary: DRQ4 added scripts/demo_improvement_backlog.py, tests/test_demo_improvement_backlog.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-drq4-demo-improvement-backlog.md. It converts rehearsal findings into three prioritized internal fixes without external dependency.
